content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-feedback framework can be augmented by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hierarchical self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data. This hybrid approach would resolve a core limitation of vanilla Self-Refine—getting stuck in local optimization minima caused by repeating the same single biased perspective.
